response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite claiming C++ exposure from a 2014 role; their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web apps, with no evidence of distributed systems, routing tiles, or navigation data pipelines critical to the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source GIS experience via GISCollective
Strong full-stack adaptability across languages and domains
Proven track record in building scalable data systems and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust development in recent roles
Lacks explicit experience with routing data pipelines or geospatial tiling
Minimal evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration
